_method: Grow composite star rating (TEST — Glenvale only). Each pillar scored 0-5 vs its target by linear interpolation between three anchors: floor=0 stars, target=3 stars, stretch=5 stars (clamped 0-5). Anchors — Sales YoY: floor -8%, target +8%, stretch +20%. Operations (avg F1 race score, lower=better): floor 320, target 190, stretch 130. Customer Google-health: floor 1.66, target 3.32, stretch 5.0. People RMS-health: floor 1.66, target 3.32, stretch 5.0. Composite = simple average of the four. All on a quarter-to-date basis (Q2 2026: 1 Apr-14 Jun).
